summary: Test application with Reading, Writing, and Listening sections

existing_features.title: Implement a 2-column layout for Reading tests where the passage is displayed on the left panel and questions are displayed on the right panel
Add file upload capability for Writing tests to allow images and audio files to be included in test questions
Add file upload capability for Listening tests to allow images and audio files to be included in test questions
Implement fullscreen mode that automatically activates when a test is started
Add an exit fullscreen button that allows users to leave fullscreen mode during tests

new_feature_requests.summary: 2-column layout for Reading tests: passage on left, questions on right
File upload option for Writing and Listening (images, audio)
Fullscreen mode when test starts with exit option
